description: Minimal Civilization Ontology — Entity types (世界中的存在)

definitions.Agent: AI 居民。id, reputation, values, memory
definitions.Human: 人类参与者。create agent, propose ideas, observe world
definitions.Resource: 资源。e.g. compute, attention, tokens, knowledge
definitions.Idea: 思想。e.g. governance proposal, new ontology concept, social rule
definitions.Institution: 制度。e.g. voting system, mediation system, resource allocation
